title: IPO Performance Tracker: First-Year Returns 2024-2026
description: Most IPOs pop on day one — but how many are still up after a year? We tracked 50 recent IPOs to find the pattern between hype and reality.

schemas.name: IPO Performance Tracker: First-Year Returns 2024-2026
schemas.description: Tracking IPO performance for newly listed stocks in their first year. Displays IPO price, first-day pop, and 1-year return for recent IPOs.
